creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
1) I would recommend keeping freebsd@ for everything.  Otherwise bugzilla is going to get confused when you submit PRs under one email and it doesn't match the port maintainer email.  It will not understand you are the maintainer.

Also, it's fantastic that you poudriere tested it. You should upload the logs as an attachment when you do that.

I'll move this to patch-ready with the recommandation to take the second patch (the one that consolidates to freebsd@ email address)
